prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息类、交通运输类等工科 专业社会热度持续偏高；江苏省2026年普通高考考生总数约521000人，按近年比例估算物理类约38万人，较2025年物理类26万人大幅增长约45%，竞争显著加剧 ，本科批物理类2025年为463分，近年稳中有升；北京交通大学位于北京市，属京校异地招生。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 8488, 9115, 8447, 18490, and 7529 respectively. In 2024, due to adjustments in subject selection requirements (addition of a major group requiring 'Physics first, then Chemistry'), the ranking significantly dropped to 18490, but recovered to 7529 in 2025, showing large fluctuations in recent two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 7529; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangsu Province: 39 in 2021, 49 in 2022, 33 in 2023, 28 in 2024, and 23 in 2025, showing a decreasing trend year by year; the 2026 plan is 27, an increase of 4 students (about 17.4%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Jiaotong University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, not a 985; in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it is about 41st, with a stable ranking in the 40–43 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving the ongoing impact of an earlier laboratory explosion and fire accident; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (overall ranking 45th), short video exposure is above average, with no obvious record of enrollment gaps; System Science A+ (top nationally), Transportation Engineering A, Information and Communication Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, with outstanding engineering strength, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer, Electronic Information, and Transportation continue to have high social popularity; in 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Jiangsu Province is about 521,000, with an estimated Physics Category of about 380,000 based on recent proportions, a significant increase of about 45% compared to 260,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; the undergraduate batch Physics Category score in 2025 was 463 points, steadily rising in recent years; Beijing Jiaotong University is located in Beijing, enrolling students from other provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 7529, the 17.4% enrollment expansion in 2026, the significant increase of about 45% in Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu Province, and the somewhat negative reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly decrease compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 8395, with a fluctuation range of 7895–8895.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Jiaotong University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked approximately 41st in the Soft Science Ranking. 预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 7023, unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a significant increase of about 45% in History Category candidates, and the university's weak liberal arts advantages, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will continue to decline slightly from 2025.
